start.content.value:
Welcome to ProductFlow Support! 🎧

We're here to help you resolve any issues quickly.

Let's get started by understanding your problem.

issue-category.content.value:
What type of issue are you experiencing?

Please select the category that best describes your problem:

issue-category.plugins.0.steps.0.content.value: We haven't heard from you yet. Please select a category so we can help you better.

technical-details.content.value:
🔧 **Technical Support**

To help resolve your technical issue quickly, please provide:

1. What were you trying to do?
2. What happened instead?
3. Any error messages you saw?

Type your response below:

billing-details.content.value:
💳 **Billing Support**

I can help with:
• Invoice questions
• Payment issues
• Refund requests
• Subscription changes

Please describe your billing concern:

knowledge-base.content.value:
📚 **How-To Support**

Great question! Let me help you learn.

Here are our most helpful resources:

• [Video Tutorials](https://help.productflow.com/videos)
• [Step-by-Step Guides](https://help.productflow.com/guides)
• [FAQ](https://help.productflow.com/faq)

Did you find what you need, or would you like to chat with our team?

account-access.content.value:
🔐 **Account Access Support**

For security reasons, account access issues require verification.

Please provide:
• Your registered email
• Last 4 digits of payment method
• Account creation date (approximate)

Type your response:

general-inquiry.content.value:
💡 Thank you for reaching out!

Please describe your request or feedback in detail, and our team will get back to you shortly.

Type your message:

ticket-created.content.value:
✅ **Ticket Created**

Ticket #{{context.ticketId}}
Category: {{context.issueCategory}}
Priority: Standard

Our support team will review your request and respond within:
• Technical: 2-4 hours
• Billing: 1-2 hours
• Other: 4-8 hours

You'll receive updates via this chat.

notify-team.content.value: Send ticket notification to support team

wait-for-resolution.content.value: Waiting for support team to resolve the issue

wait-for-resolution.reason.value: Give support team 4 hours to investigate and respond

feedback-request.content.value:
🌟 **We'd Love Your Feedback**

How would you rate your support experience?

1 = Poor, 5 = Excellent

thank-you-end.content.value:
Thank you for your feedback! 🙏

Your rating: {{context.supportRating}}

We're always working to improve. If you need help in the future, we're here 24/7.

Have a great day! ✨

reopen-ticket.content.value:
I'm sorry the issue persists. 😔

We're reopening your ticket and escalating to our senior support team.

Ticket #{{context.ticketId}} - ESCALATED

Please provide more details about what's still not working:

escalate-end.content.value:
Your ticket has been escalated to our senior support team.

Ticket #{{context.ticketId}}
Status: ESCALATED - HIGH PRIORITY

A senior engineer will contact you within 30 minutes.

Thank you for your patience. 🙏

kb-check.content.value: Check if knowledge base resolved the issue

kb-resolved-end.content.value:
Great! 🎉 We're glad you found the answer.

If you need more help in the future, we're always here!

Happy building! 🚀
